channel.title: Art on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Art on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Industry Changes
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about industry changes because there have been a lot of stuff going on: a lot of layoffs recently, a lot of concern about AI taking jobs.

item.title: Challenges Facing Game Artists
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to finish my series on challenges that game developers face by talking about the challenges that artists face, and I almost didn’t do this one because I know
